data.name: Flexbar-Plugin-Youtube-Music-Desktop-App
data.description: A YouTube Music integration plugin for FlexBar that provides real-time music information display and playback controls via the YouTube Music Desktop App's Companion Server API.

data.name: Game-of-Life-Multiplatform
data.description: A Conway's Game of Life implementation built with Kotlin Multiplatform, running natively on mobile, desktop, and web from a single shared codebase.

data.name: jku-master-project-network-devices-power-consumption-analysis
data.description: A web-based test runner for measuring power consumption and network throughput of devices under test, supporting UDP, TCP, and Layer 2 load generation with real-time FritzBox smart plug monitoring and SQLite-backed test storage.

data.name: LSTM-Based-Speaker-Diarization
data.description: Bachelor thesis implementation of an LSTM-based speaker diarization system, comparing LSTM and BiLSTM architectures for d-vector generation with multiple clustering algorithms and comprehensive hyperparameter analysis.

data.name: Lebenslauf
data.description: A professional curriculum vitae and cover letter written in Typst, showcasing the Typst typesetting system as a modern, code-first alternative to LaTeX for structured document design.

data.name: LinuxHello
data.description: A Windows Hello-style face authentication system for Linux with PAM integration, IR camera support, anti-spoofing protection, and a modern Wails-based web management GUI.

data.name: WordWiz
data.description: A SvelteKit web app that uses trie data structures to efficiently search for words matching pattern and length filters, supporting both English and German word lists.

data.name: cg-lab-2023-project-reineggersilber
data.description: A WebGL-based 3D animated short film created for the Computer Graphics lab at JKU Linz, featuring heightmap terrain generation, dynamic lighting, and a multi-scene story with portals and an alien planet.

data.name: homelab-speedtest
data.description: A homelab network performance monitoring tool that measures bandwidth and latency between devices using a Go-based SSH worker, with a real-time Svelte dashboard, alert rules via ntfy, and Docker deployment.

data.name: homepage
data.description: Personal homepage with automated data aggregation

data.name: mljrCSS
data.description: A TailwindCSS-based CSS framework and Svelte 5 component library featuring a Claymorphism design system with warm orange primary and soft teal secondary colors, supporting both light and dark modes.

data.name: nightscout-display
data.description: A feature-rich Elgato Stream Deck plugin displaying live blood glucose data from Nightscout with number and graph display modes, color-coded readings, trend arrows, and configurable time ranges.

data.name: nightscout-librelink-up-go
data.description: Lightweight Go service that syncs glucose data from Abbott's LibreLink Up to Nightscout CGM platform. Runs as a containerized microservice with automatic data polling and real-time updates.

data.name: nightscout-tray
data.description: A cross-platform system tray application built with Wails3 and Svelte that shows real-time blood glucose data from Nightscout, including number display, graph visualization, and trend arrows.

data.name: service-template
data.description: A Go-based web service template for my ansible based homelab automation with Docker containerization, CI/CD via GitHub Actions, and multi-environment support (production & staging).

data.name: sudoku-gen
data.description: A web app for generating and printing Sudoku puzzles in 9×9, 12×12, and 16×16 sizes across normal and jigsaw variants, with adjustable difficulty, a database-backed list viewer, and bulk printing with or without solutions.
